anti_templating_check: Six pages read as a distinct set across the three differentiator tiers active in this MW2 Stage 2 RUN lane. Tier 1 definitional on-ramps (B1 FIC + B2 ID-verification): question-led H2s, plain-language tone, funnel to deeper pages. Tier 2 specialist explainers (B3 VAT artificial separation case-law-led + B4 CIS process-led decision-tree + B5 home-office action-led deep-dive): concept- and action-led H2s, statute + worked-example density, mid-depth body. Tier 3 reactive on-ramp (B6 CH email scam-vetting + news-led): urgency cues, sender-domain authentication checklist, deadline framing, forward-link to B2 (definitional) + operational walkthrough. Boilerplate (no-em-dash, anonymised personas, internal-link cross-references) is verbatim per house style; substantive content distinct.
cross_pick_coordination_check: B1 -> existing FIC decision pillar / mechanics reference / BPR myth / trust-vs-FIC / growth-shares / gifting-shares cluster + forward-link to B2/B6 ID-verification siblings. B2 -> existing ECCTA operational walkthrough + B6 sibling + B18 US-director sibling + existing confirmation-statement page. B3 -> existing VAT TOGC / option-to-tax / registration-threshold / FHL-VAT / reverse-charge / TOMS cluster (canonical entry point, no internal MW2-B overlap). B4 -> existing domestic-reverse-charge + landlord-expenses-allowable-uk-2026 (canonical entry point, no internal MW2-B overlap). B5 -> existing landlord-expenses pillar + PPR + 2027-incorporation-decision (CGT-trap differentiator; out-of-wave back-patch flag raised D-24 for the pillar's home-office section). B6 -> B2 + existing ECCTA operational walkthrough + existing confirmation-statement page. Cross-link directionality enforced: definitional on-ramps -> operational walkthroughs and pillars; specialist explainers -> canonical entry points with sibling cross-links to adjacent regimes (CIS <-> reverse charge, VAT artificial separation <-> threshold/TOGC); reactive on-ramp -> definitional sibling + operational walkthrough. No cross-pick contradictions.
